parts.text: {"research_notes":[{"claim":"Recent filings highlight steady vertical software adoption.","source_title":"Company investor presentation","source_url":"https://example.com/investor","source_type":"company_material","published_at":"2026-02-18","confidence_note":"Primary company source; directly attributable but potentially optimistic."}],"catalyst_evidence":[{"claim":"A platform rollout is scheduled for 2026.","source_title":"Product launch note","source_url":"https://example.com/launch","source_type":"company_material","published_at":"2026-01-12","confidence_note":"Concrete announced rollout timing."}],"risk_evidence":[{"claim":"Customer concentration remains above 20% of revenue.","source_title":"10-K risk factors","source_url":"https://example.com/risk","source_type":"filing","published_at":"2026-02-20","confidence_note":"Explicitly disclosed in filings."}],"management_observations":[{"claim":"Management reiterated multi-year margin targets on the earnings call.","source_title":"Q4 earnings call transcript","source_url":"https://example.com/call","source_type":"transcript","published_at":"2026-02-21","confidence_note":"Direct management commentary."}],"moat_observations":[{"claim":"Workflow integrations increase switching costs for enterprise customers.","source_title":"Industry research note","source_url":"https://example.com/moat","source_type":"third_party_research","published_at":"2026-02-25","confidence_note":"Inference from industry analyst note."}],"precedent_observations":[{"claim":"A prior peer rerated after completing a similar platform consolidation.","source_title":"Comparable company case study","source_url":"https://example.com/precedent","source_type":"third_party_research","published_at":"2025-11-03","confidence_note":"Comparable precedent, not direct company evidence."}],"epistemic_anchors":[{"claim":"The main uncertainty is whether rollout uptake converts to durable net retention expansion.","source_title":"Sell-side preview","source_url":"https://example.com/anchor","source_type":"sell_side_research","published_at":"2026-02-26","confidence_note":"Useful framing anchor, still external opinion."}]}
